description: Use this API to add OPF generator dispatch data to all records in a specified subsystem of the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_gendsp_subsys(sid, all, apdtbl, dsptch, useval)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_gendsp_subsys(sid, all, apdtbl, dsptch, useval)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem id from 0 to 11. a subsystem must have been previously defined. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: apdtbl
parameters.description: Active power dispatch table cross reference number. (input; default of 0 for new record, current value otherwise).

parameters.name: dsptch
parameters.description: Dispatch fraction. (input; default of 1.0 for new record, current value otherwise).

parameters.name: useval
parameters.description: Indicates how the value of dsptch should be applied (default treatment same as value of 0). (input).

all.description: process all buses, use existing data values.
process all buses, use default data values.

useval.description: if the value of DSPTCH is to be used as defined.
if the value of DSPTCH is to be multiplied by the present value of the dispatch fraction.
if the value of DSPTCH is to be added to the present value of the dispatch fraction.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
